commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Parallelize row-count validation with bounded concurrency (#31)

* Claude commands

* Parallelize row-count validation with bounded concurrency

Refactor validateMigration to run source and target COUNT(*) queries
in parallel using a semaphore-bounded worker pool, matching the
existing concurrency pattern in migrateData. Workers are capped by
source backend limits (SQLite stays single-threaded). Results are
collected in original table order for deterministic reporting.

Also adds timing instrumentation and tests for worker capping logic.

Closes #28

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review feedback

- Use select-based semaphore acquire so goroutines blocked waiting for
  a worker slot exit promptly on context cancellation instead of
  waiting for a slot that will never matter.
- Replace errCh with sync.Once-guarded firstErr to guarantee the root
  cause error is returned, not a context.Canceled from a concurrent
  goroutine.
- Replace concrete mysqlSourceDB embedding in stubSourceDB with
  interface embedding to decouple tests from internal struct layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

ci(mirror): fix alpine/git entrypoint override for mirror:github job

alpine/git image uses 'git' as ENTRYPOINT which causes GitLab CI to
run 'git sh -c ...' instead of 'sh -c ...'. Override with empty
entrypoint so the runner can execute the shell script normally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Movistar static routes to bird2 as fallback — router doesn't send RIP

The Movistar router does not broadcast RIP v2 (confirmed by tcpdump).
Add static routes in bird2 so they're managed by bird alongside the
RIP listener. If the router ever starts sending RIP, learned routes
will take priority. The kernel export filter is updated to allow
these static routes through.

commit.message:
fix: trigger TCC dialog from setup.py GUI — not Guardian background daemon

ROOT CAUSE: macOS silently ignores TCC prompt requests from background
LaunchAgents. Guardian's SCShareableContent call timed out every time
because macOS never showed the dialog to a background process.

FIX: Call SCShareableContent from setup.py (the pywebview GUI process)
instead. Both processes run the same python3.11 binary, and macOS TCC
tracks permissions by executable path — so a grant from setup.py's
dialog also covers Guardian.

sync: Document Management Fázis 0-3 + server.js fix — DEV→TEST

Fázis 0 — Document entity refactor (db/schema.cds, document-engine.js, lifecycle-engine.js):
  - isDeleted/isExternal/source → lifecycleState/storageType/sourceContext enum
  - deletedAt/deletedBy megtartva (M1 döntés — audit trail)

Fázis 1 — Admin Document tab: Storage Statistics (AdminPage.jsx, services.cds, admin-service.js)
  - getDocumentStats() — KPI kártyák: total/active/linked/pool/orphans/S3 status

Fázis 2 — Admin Document tab: Pool Admin View (AdminPage.jsx)
  - Pool csoport lista + dokumentum lista + Claim/Release gombok

Fázis 3 — Admin Document tab: Orphan Document Management (AdminPage.jsx, services.cds, admin-service.js)
  - listOrphanDocuments() — táblázat + kor highlight (>24h narancs, >72h piros)
  - softDeleteDocuments() — bulk soft delete + AuditEvent
  - hardDeleteDocuments() — M3: csak DELETED+S3, S3 delete + DB delete + AuditEvent

server.js fixes (Fázis 0 frontend migration):
  - POST /api/files/upload: source→sourceContext enum, isExternal/isDeleted→storageType/lifecycleState
  - POST /api/files/upload-from-web: source='WEB_IMPORT', storageType='S3'
  - GET /api/files/download: isDeleted→lifecycleState==='DELETED', isExternal→storageType==='EXTERNAL'
  - DELETE /api/files/:id: isDeleted:true → lifecycleState:'DELETED' + deletedAt + deletedBy

ECP_PLATFORM_v7_0.jsx + DocumentStorePage.jsx fixes:
  - OData filter: isDeleted eq false → lifecycleState ne 'DELETED'
  - doc mapping: d.source→d.sourceContext, d.isExternal→d.storageType==='EXTERNAL'
  - uploadToStore: source='upload'→'store' (CASE_UI→STORE_UI)

test/document-upload-test.js (új, 14 teszt):
  - T01-T11: upload/download/delete/link/external/admin
  - T12-T14: OData filter + doc store refresh
  - Result: 33 PASS / 0 FAIL / 0 WARN

Plugins: NEM másoltuk (TEST-ben csak admin plugin van)

fix: remove "moves tomorrow" from weekend search to prevent double-polling

The secondary weekend poll was matching the overnight "moves tomorrow"
thread instead of the actual weekend thread, causing duplicate API
calls and rate limiting. Weekend thread comments are already in the
DB from earlier polling.

fix(qr): always refreshQR when no QR available to clear stale auth

Previous fix was too narrow in detecting stale auth states. Simplified
to: if QR is not immediately available, call refreshQR() which clears
stored auth, socket, and re-initializes clean so Baileys generates a
fresh QR. Protected against concurrent calls from frontend polling.

Other tenants (UOL, Avangrid) see only their own data.

commit.message:
fix: use LibreOffice for PDF→DOCX to fix Arabic/RTL text loss

pdf2docx completely loses Arabic text because it has no RTL or Arabic
shaping support. Switch to LibreOffice headless for PDF→DOCX (same as
DOCX→PDF) which handles Arabic, RTL, bidirectional text, and complex
scripts correctly.

Also:
- Remove pdf2docx dependency (no longer needed)
- Add Arabic locale (ar_AE.UTF-8) to Docker image for proper text shaping
- Set LANG/LC_ALL env vars when running LibreOffice for DOCX→PDF

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix mobile nav: fixed header, opaque overlay, logo + close button inside menu

- Header changed from sticky to fixed (reliable across all mobile browsers)
- Added body padding-top to compensate for fixed header height
- Mobile overlay: fully opaque #0b0d11 bg, items flow from top not center
- Logo row (logo + SWRTHY name) appears at top of open menu
- Dedicated close button (✕) inside overlay at z-index 201
- Menu toggle stays at z-index 101 (above header, below overlay)
- Nav links span full width with subtle dividers

fix: accept string integers in MCP tool parameters

Some MCP clients (e.g. Claude Code) serialize integer parameters as
strings. All integer fields now accept both number and numeric string,
coercing the latter to Number via zod union + transform.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Serialize conversation to/from JSON between each agent turn in tools example (#4)

Demonstrates that Conversation is fully JSON-serializable by round-tripping
through encoding/json after every client.

Send call, simulating storage between
turns (e.g. as a Temporal workflow payload or persisted state).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Qj9zpsk28zGReGn2uvco4Z

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix phone number verification to handle different formats

Phone numbers in the database are stored in various formats (with dashes, +1 prefix, or plain digits), but the verify-phone API was only checking exact matches. This caused "phone number not recognized" errors for members whose numbers had formatting.

Changes:
- Normalize both input phone and database phone numbers by removing all non-digits
- Compare last 10 digits to match phone numbers regardless of format
- Fetch all active members and filter in-memory to handle normalization

This fixes the login issue where members with formatted phone numbers (e.g., 913-424-8327) couldn't be recognized.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feature: Interaktive Karte — Glassmorphism-Hover, Marker-Filter & Active-State

Hover-Card (Glassmorphism):

  halbtransparente Karte (rgba weiß 88%, blur 16px) beim Hovern
- Zeigt: Maschinen-Icon, Name, Seriennummer, Fehlerstatus-Chip
  (farbig), Techniker-Avatar + Name, "Klicken für Details →"
- Positionierung folgt der Maus, klemmt an Viewport-Ränder
- Klick auf Marker öffnet weiterhin die Maschinenakte

Marker-Filter:
- Klick auf Techniker → nur dessen Maschinen bleiben voll sichtbar,
  alle anderen auf 12% Opacity gedimmt (pointerEvents deaktiviert)
- Techniker mit mehreren Maschinen → flyToBounds() statt flyTo()
- Klick auf Maschine → nur dieser Marker sichtbar
- "Filter zurücksetzen"-Strip erscheint in Sidebar (blauer Chip)
  und stellt alle Marker wieder her
- Suche setzt den Filter automatisch zurück

Sidebar Active-State:
- Aktivierter Marker-Dot wechselt auf #0052CC mit Glow-Ring
- Kein doppeltes Active-Icon durch CSS-Override
